title: Shrek Is Life
description: This cursed Shrek Texture Pack might be for you if you love Shrek. This is for Beta 1.7.3
body:
# Shrek Is Life! Beta 1.7.3 Texture Pack. 

This Texture Pack is purposely bad. Really no effort was put into this.

This is an old style texture back for version beta 1.7.3

What you see is what you get. SHREK.
